videoThesis: The video opens in complete darkness with no visible content, audio, motion, or discernible features, suggesting either a fade-in from black, an intro sequence, or a pre-roll state before the primary content begins.

semanticUnits.meaning: The video begins with a completely black screen containing no visible subjects, text, graphics, motion, or light. No audio cues are present, indicating a pre-content or fade-in state awaiting the start of the main video material.
